practices.name: A Noble Counseling

evidence.label: No online booking
evidence.evidence_str: There’s no way to book or request an appointment online — no scheduling tool and no contact form on the homepage.

evidence.label: Built on Squarespace
evidence.evidence_str: The site is built on Squarespace.

practices.draft_observation: There’s no way to book or request an appointment from A Noble Counseling's site.

evidence.label: No online booking

practices.draft_observation: There’s no way to book or request an appointment from A Better Life Counseling Center's site.
